name: Jo Story Senior Center
description: Jo Story Senior Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Roanoke Rapids, NC. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The facility is wheelchair accessible. The court is free.

name: Rochelle Park
description: Rochelle Park is a place to play pickleball in Roanoke Rapids, NC. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: T J Davis Recreation Center
description: T J Davis Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Roanoke Rapids, NC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
